description_long: This object is a stylized flower with broad, pointed petals radiating outward from a central base. The petals are arranged in a roughly circular pattern, overlapping slightly and creating a layered, whorled appearance. The flower is rendered in a uniform, soft purple color, giving it a somewhat ethereal and decorative look. There is no visible stem or leaves attached to the base, and the petals appear thick and slightly curved, with smooth edges. The overall form is low and wide, with the petals spreading horizontally more than vertically. The surface of the petals appears matte and semi-soft, with minimal gloss or reflectivity.
description: A stylized, broad-petaled purple flower with a whorled, layered arrangement and a matte finish. The petals radiate outward in a circular pattern, creating a low, wide form.
description_view_0: From this view, the flower's broad, pointed petals are clearly visible, radiating outward in a symmetrical, circular pattern.
description_view_1: This angle shows the overlapping and layering of the petals, with some petals appearing more upright and others spreading outward.
description_view_2: The flower appears slightly more compact from this view, with the central whorl of petals more prominent and the outer petals extending horizontally.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the asymmetry in the petal arrangement, with some petals curving upward and others lying flatter.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration, with overlapping layers radiating symmetrically from the center. The arrangement is circular and exhibits moderate layering, typical of many ornamental flowers.
